testcase.name: test_dock_delete_clears_apk_build_id

failure.message: AssertionError: DELETE /api/admin/dock/movies/apk did NOT clear apk_build_id from store.json — remnant: '492b1b1c7f2b45bea096cab51b23b593' assert not '492b1b1c7f2b45bea096cab51b23b593' + where '492b1b1c7f2b45bea096cab51b23b593' = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfc97e3de0800>('apk_build_id') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfc97e3de0800> = {'accent': '#3dd8ff', 'apk_build_id': '492b1b1c7f2b45bea096cab51b23b593', 'apk_filename': None, 'apk_package_id': None, ...}.get

testcase.failure: tests/test_build_id_edge_cases.py:124: in test_dock_delete_clears_apk_build_id assert not tile.get("apk_build_id"), ( E AssertionError: DELETE /api/admin/dock/movies/apk did NOT clear apk_build_id from store.json — remnant: '492b1b1c7f2b45bea096cab51b23b593' E assert not '492b1b1c7f2b45bea096cab51b23b593' E + where '492b1b1c7f2b45bea096cab51b23b593' = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfc97e3de0800>('apk_build_id') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfc97e3de0800> = {'accent': '#3dd8ff', 'apk_build_id': '492b1b1c7f2b45bea096cab51b23b593', 'apk_filename': None, 'apk_package_id': None, ...}.get
